conservative.name: Skeleton In The Closet
conservative.requirements: You must be aware of a secret shame from the target's past. Target must be able to hear you; if anyone aside from the target can hear you (i.e. you're in public), add L to the dice pool

success.description: Through oh-so subtle innuendo and body language, you let the target know that you know about his shameful past... and that you're willing to expose it. Influence the target.
As above, and add to the next action the target makes with you as the target

bane.description: Add to future Social actions against the same target

reckless.name: Skeleton In The Closet
reckless.requirements: Target must be able to see and hear you; if anyone aside from the target can hear you (i.e. you're in public), add L to the dice pool

success.description: Getting by on pure guesswork and bravado, you intimate that you know a dark secret from the target's past - which you most certainly do not. Influence the target.

bane.description: Add to future Social actions against the same target

chaosStar.description: You have made a dangerous enemy today... if you're lucky, it's the target

sigmarsComet.description: The target goes white as a sheet and excuses himself, going off to... check on something for the immediate future
